title: Opt-in native raw FITS completion queue
scope: Add native RawFitsReadQueue pybind class with C++ worker threads and per-frame completions.
Expose Python capability and factory functions.
Wire resident CUDA pinned-ring prefetch to use the native queue only when GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_READ=1.
Preserve ready-first scheduling with per-frame completions.
Record queue state and timing fields in resident artifacts and resident light pipeline profiles.

commands.queue_real_run: GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_READ=1 glass run --plan C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate540_plan_spec_cache/runs_20260623_140314/processing_plan.json --out C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate545_native_queue_read/runs_20260623_153000/native_queue_optin_release --backend cuda --memory-mode resident --until-stage integration --local-normalization off --integration-rejection winsorized_sigma --integration-weighting none --flat-floor 0.05 --resident-registration similarity_cuda_triangle --resident-star-threshold 350 --resident-star-max-candidates 48 --resident-star-tolerance-px 3 --resident-ncc-sample-stride 4 --resident-warp-interpolation lanczos3 --reference-frame-id LIGHT_H_0136 --resident-output-maps audit --resident-master-cache-dir C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate518_dq_stats_reuse/runs_20260623_094619/resident_master_cache
commands.fresh_default_real_run: glass run --plan C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate540_plan_spec_cache/runs_20260623_140314/processing_plan.json --out C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate545_native_queue_read/runs_20260623_153000/default_fresh_release --backend cuda --memory-mode resident --until-stage integration --local-normalization off --integration-rejection winsorized_sigma --integration-weighting none --flat-floor 0.05 --resident-registration similarity_cuda_triangle --resident-star-threshold 350 --resident-star-max-candidates 48 --resident-star-tolerance-px 3 --resident-ncc-sample-stride 4 --resident-warp-interpolation lanczos3 --reference-frame-id LIGHT_H_0136 --resident-output-maps audit --resident-master-cache-dir C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate518_dq_stats_reuse/runs_20260623_094619/resident_master_cache

device.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

known_limitations: Native queue read is opt-in and not promoted to default.
Same-session speedup is modest and below the best historical warm-cache default run.
The Python drain/cache handoff remains in the path.
Eligible inputs are currently simple BITPIX=16, BSCALE=1, BZERO=32768 primary-image FITS files without unsupported blank-value semantics.
next_gate: Feed native queue completions directly into H2D/calibration wave scheduling to reduce Python drain/cache handoff while preserving ready-first scheduling.

clean_room.notes: This gate uses GLASS code, public FITS byte layout rules, user image data, and GLASS/user-generated timing artifacts. It does not inspect external implementation source or alter input data.
